_doc: Search Planner LLM call contract. Documents the exact prompt, payload shape, response schema, and post-processing rules for the Schema 4 NeedSet planner LLM call. Source: searchPlanBuilder.js:24-78 (schema+prompt), 305-374 (call), 383-434 (post-processing). Updated 2026-03-16.

call_site.gate: hasLlmRouteApiKey(config, { role: 'plan' }) — returns disabled result when false

system_prompt.role: search planner for hardware specification data collection
rules: Generate 1-3 queries per active group, each targeting different search strategies
Vary query families: manufacturer_html, manual_pdf, support_docs, review_lookup, benchmark_lookup, fallback_web, targeted_single
Prefer manufacturer docs, instrumented lab reviews, and trusted spec databases
Avoid junk domains, login pages, forums, and irrelevant topics
Do NOT repeat queries from existing_queries — generate DIFFERENT patterns
Use domains_tried_union to AVOID domains already visited — target DIFFERENT domains
Use host_classes_tried_union to diversify: if 'manufacturer' tried, try 'review' or 'database'
Use evidence_classes_tried_union to vary content types: if 'html' tried, target 'pdf' or 'json-ld'
When no_value_attempts is high (3+), radically change search strategy
weak_field_keys need CORROBORATION queries (authoritative sources to confirm)
conflict_field_keys need RESOLUTION queries (manufacturer/official sources to settle)
Use aliases_union to generate variant-aware queries
Each query must have 'family' (strategy type) and 'q' (search query text)
Return JSON with a 'groups' array where each group has 'key' and 'queries' array

focus_groups._note: Only groups with phase='now' or phase='next' (hold groups filtered out). Dead domains and dead query hashes removed before inclusion.

_per_group_shape.domain_hints_union: string[] — dead domains removed, CAPPED TO 5
_per_group_shape.existing_queries_union: string[] — dead hashes removed, CAPPED TO 5

response_schema._encoding: JSON Schema passed via callLlmWithRouting({ jsonSchema })

key._note: must match a focus_group key from the payload

reason_active._note: why this group is being searched

family._note: manufacturer_html | manual_pdf | support_docs | review_lookup | benchmark_lookup | fallback_web | targeted_single

target_fields._note: optional field keys this query targets

duplicates_suppressed._note: LLM self-reported dupe count (informational only — real dedup is post-LLM)

targeted_exceptions._note: exceptional queries added outside normal rules

response_normalization._note: Some models (e.g. Gemini) return a single group object { key, queries } instead of wrapping in { groups: [...] }. Both shapes are accepted.
response_normalization.array_groups: if llmResult.groups is an array, use directly
response_normalization.single_group: if llmResult.key exists and llmResult.queries is an array, wrap as [llmResult]

dedup._note: Queries are deduped by hash against (1) existing_queries from Schema 3 and (2) previously emitted queries in this call

capping.per_group_cap: 3 queries max per group (PER_GROUP_CAP constant, line 80)
capping.cap_overflow: queries exceeding either cap are counted as dupesDropped

query_assembly._note: Each accepted query is enriched with metadata before inclusion in Schema 4
query_assembly.q: string — trimmed query text from LLM
query_assembly.query_hash: string — deterministic hash for cross-round dedup
query_assembly.exact_match_required: boolean — from LLM or false fallback

error_handling.llm_call_failure: catch block (line 376-379) returns makeErrorResult(ctx, error) — mode='error', plannerComplete=false, error message captured
error_handling.no_api_key: hasLlmRouteApiKey gate (line 283) returns makeDisabledResult(ctx) — mode='disabled', plannerComplete=true, zero queries
error_handling.empty_llm_response: normalized to groups=[] — returns Schema 4 with zero queries but full panel/bundle metadata
